concerns: workspace-setup.test.ts shells out to npm run build/typecheck/lint inside the test suite, making `npm run test` slow and creating potential for circular failures — plan acknowledges the risk but proposes no mitigation
Plan is over-specified for what is essentially a verification task — 8 steps for work that amounts to: install deps, run 3 commands, commit if needed
node_modules already exists in the worktree; Step 1 (npm install) may be redundant — verify first to avoid unnecessary work
